---
title: ""
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'phd.html'))})
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    css: "style.css"
---

<center> <h1>Graduate Education - Ph.D.</h1> </center>

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

<center>
<img src="cornell.jpg" style="width:55%">
</center>

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

## Doctor of Philosophy: Applied Economics & Management
Cornell University Graduate School, Ithaca, NY 

- **Honors and Awards:** 
- Russell Sage Foundation Dissertation Grant ($10,000) for the project “COVID-driven technology adoption and worker inequality in the US” (spring 2022)
-Center for Teaching Innovation Graduate Teaching Fellowship, Cornell University (2022-2023)
-Graduate Teaching Assistant – Outstanding Service Award 2021, Dyson School of Applied Economics & Management, Cornell University (spring 2021)
-Serve in Place Grant (for a community service project) from Cornell University (spring 2021)

- **Special Committee:** Professors Ravi Kanbur, Chris Forman, Seth Sanders, and Dan Black (University of Chicago)

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>
